title: Adam's Apple
description: Restores the Recipe for the "God Apple"
body:
# Restores crafting recipe for the "God Apple" 

### A.K.A. The Enchanted Golden Apple so you can craft it once again versus only finding it in chests in strongholds, fortresses etc etc.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce5972112acacb995a93c7ef55358cb9b749c52.png)

### Will also show up in the crafting recipe book:
![Recipe Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40b2e1e6e6a7bb2b184f14802f6d2966bdd8870f.png)

Checkout my other plugins: [CLICK HERE](https://modrinth.com/user/never2nv/plugins)
